title: Dahlstedtia araripensis

The plant is known for its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment. As a member of the Urticaceae family, it shares similarities with other plants such as stinging nettles and figworts. More research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships within the Dahlstedtia genus.
